calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
C. Martin Gibson, Esq., for Plaintiff: Luxor Cab Company, Inc., with Witness: Naomi Goodwin.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Natividad Mendez and Sean LaGrande AKA Sean L. Grande as follows:
Damages/Principal $6,061.61
Prejudgment Interest $1,946.36
Costs $295.80, for a total of $8,303.77
Judgment signed in open court.
